title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks family as a Full Stack Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!
jsonLd.skills: REST APIs, JavaScript, AWS, Git, Go, React, TypeScript, Microservices
